{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":400}","has_more":false,"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353489528727028530","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的情节很吸引人，角色也各有特点。特别是那个狐狸精的角色，让我想起了生活中那些古灵精怪的人，给故事增添了很多趣味。而且作者的创作灵感来源于游戏，这让我很有共鸣，有时候游戏中的一个小细节就能激发我们的想象力。不过，书名确实不够响亮，有点可惜。总的来说，这本书很有趣，值得一读！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708577989,"group_id":"7029630385935879205","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Q/DYKv6V1nPpVBx0rKNDOtzk5Y4/VH2oGP8OuermeW","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2597519330126121","user_name":"爱吃营养粉的秦敬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2597519330126121","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7029630385935879205","book_info":{"abstract":"一个私逃下山的狐狸精缠上了差点一剑了解自己性命的冷漠男子。 众所周知的病秧子却总也不死还成了当今皇上的得力助手，本是稳操胜握的计谋却被某个无聊置极的狐狸精破了自己的冷静。 有个皇宫贵族的小王爷性格诡异，反复无常，身边的小奴才在主子身边活得水深火热。 心思深沉的男子却偏偏与一个冷血和一个笑面虎的男人们成为兄弟，跟他们结交后自己从小养成的规矩就成了狗屁。 还有那些妓院里的姑娘们，她们散尽风情到底是爱着谁？还是在惦记男人兜里的银子？ 一人之下万人之上的权臣却意图谋反，机关算尽老贼到底能不能斗过这些性情奇异的人们？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/78b2a6016d8a78caf2d32828d36fbfb0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夏日骄阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7029630385935879205","book_name":"仙道修炼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":16,\"name\":\"武侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16\u0026name=武侠\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":259,\"name\":\"奇幻仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259\u0026name=奇幻仙侠\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":971,\"name\":\"玄幻小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=971\u0026name=玄幻小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":511,\"name\":\"东方玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511\u0026name=东方玄幻\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7029633257687747595","read_count":"32","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"409636"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"253","tags":"东方仙侠,精品小说,玄幻小说,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,东方玄幻,武侠,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelp
